chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2839 of 2025 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah 17.11.2025 Mr. Shah Imroze Khan, advocate for Applicant. Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, A.P.G. a/w SIP Ashfaq Ahmed. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J:- After arguing at some length, learned counsel for the applicant does not press this application and seeks directions for expeditious trial. Learned APG and I.O. present in the Court have accepted the proposal. 2. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed, however, the learned trial Court is directed to conclude the trial preferably in six months. I.O. is directed to appear before the trial Court for evidence without fail. 3. The observations made herein above are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. This Cr. Bail Applications is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Imran
